entry.title: ABot-Earth 0.5: Generative 3D Earth Model
entry.summary: We present ABot-Earth 0.5, a generative 3D framework designed to synthesize vast, seamless 3D environments from ubiquitous, geospatially referenced satellite imagery. To achieve this, we propose a nov... · Upvotes: 463 · GitHub Stars: 137 · Authors: Ming Qian, Tianjian Ouyang, Mingchao Sun

entry.title: Agents' Last Exam
entry.summary: Recent AI systems have achieved strong results on a wide range of benchmarks, yet these gains have not translated into economically meaningful deployment across many professional domains. We argue tha... · Upvotes: 335 · GitHub Stars: 637 · Authors: Yiyou Sun, Xinyang Han, Weichen Zhang

entry.title: PaddleOCR-VL-1.6: Expanding the Frontier of Document Parsing with Under-Optimized Region Refinement and Progressive Post-Training
entry.summary: We introduce PaddleOCR-VL-1.6, an upgraded compact document parsing model built upon PaddleOCR-VL-1.5. Although PaddleOCR-VL-1.5 establishes a strong 0.9B baseline, its remaining errors concentrate in... · Upvotes: 16 · GitHub Stars: 82123 · Authors: Zelun Zhang, Hongen Liu, Suyin Liang

entry.title: Ultralytics YOLO26: Unified Real-Time End-to-End Vision Models
entry.summary: Real-time vision demands models that are accurate, efficient, and simple to deploy across diverse hardware. The YOLO family has become widely deployed for this reason, yet most YOLO detectors still re... · Upvotes: 10 · GitHub Stars: 58377 · Authors: Glenn Jocher, Jing Qiu, Mengyu Liu

entry.title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
entry.summary: We introduce Cosmos 3, a family of omnimodal world models designed to jointly process and generate language, image, video, audio, and action sequences within a unified mixture-of-transformers architec... · Upvotes: 119 · GitHub Stars: 10188 · Authors: Aditi, Niket Agarwal, Arslan Ali

entry.title: On the Scaling of PEFT: Towards Million Personal Models of Trillion Parameters
entry.summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) is usually treated as a cheaper alternative to full fine-tuning. We study a broader role: small trainable adapters as persistent local state on top of strong sha... · Upvotes: 228 · Authors: Mind Lab, Song Cao, Vic Cao

entry.title: COLLEAGUE.SKILL: Automated AI Skill Generation via Expert Knowledge Distillation
entry.summary: LLM agents are increasingly expected not only to complete isolated tasks, but also to carry bounded representations of human expertise, judgment, and interaction style. entry.title: Gamma-World: Generative Multi-Agent World Modeling Beyond Two Players

entry.title: SkillOpt: Executive Strategy for Self-Evolving Agent Skills

entry.title: HRM-Text: Efficient Pretraining Beyond Scaling
entry.summary: The current pretraining paradigm for large language models relies on massive compute and internet-scale raw text, creating a significant barrier to foundational research. entry.title: AutoResearchClaw: Self-Reinforcing Autonomous Research with Human-AI Collaboration

entry.title: CiteVQA: Benchmarking Evidence Attribution for Trustworthy Document Intelligence
entry.summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly advanced document understanding, yet current Doc-VQA evaluations score only the final answer and leave the supporting evidence unchecked.
